creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 213203
svn diff for x11-themes/claws-mail-themes: adds LICENSE modifies MAINTAINER

The attached svn diff adds missing LICENSE and
as long as I am maintainer for claws-mail, I
might as well maintain this too. :)

CHANGES
Makefile:
adds LICENSE
takes MAINTAINER

that's it!

--Chris

NOTE this port is currently maintained by ports@
which makes maintainer-approval implicit.
